brandIdentity.designSummary: This design features a minimalistic and refined aesthetic with a spacious, balanced layout. The color palette is dominated by a soft, warm off-white background paired with black and dark gray text for high contrast and readability. Typography plays a central role, combining large, bold, geometric sans-serif headings with delicate italic serif body text to create a sophisticated editorial tone. The layout uses generous white space and a modular grid with consistent margins and subtle rounded corners on images and cards, adding a modern yet approachable softness. UI elements are understated with thin borders and minimal fills, emphasizing clarity and elegance. Overall, the design conveys a timeless, high-end brand identity suitable for luxury products, focusing on simplicity, clarity, and subtle sophistication.
brandIdentity.toneOfVoice: Sophisticated, minimalistic, elegant, and modern with a calm and refined personality.

palette.paletteUsageGuide: Use the 'background' color as the primary canvas to create a soft, warm environment that supports content without distraction. The 'primary' color is reserved for main text and headings to ensure maximum readability and strong visual hierarchy. The 'secondary' color is used for less prominent text and UI elements, providing subtle contrast without overpowering the primary text. The 'subtleBorder' color is ideal for delicate dividing lines and borders around interactive elements, maintaining the minimal aesthetic. The 'mutedGray' color can be used for secondary UI elements or placeholder text to add depth without breaking the calm tone. All colors should be combined to maintain high contrast and accessibility, with 'primary' text on 'background' for main content and 'secondary' for supporting text. Avoid using heavy fills or saturated colors to preserve the understated luxury feel.
palette.paletteAccessibilityNotes: The 'primary' color on 'background' provides excellent contrast exceeding WCAG AA standards for all text sizes. The 'secondary' color on 'background' also meets WCAG AA contrast requirements for body text and UI elements. Borders and subtle UI accents using 'subtleBorder' and 'mutedGray' maintain sufficient contrast for visibility without overwhelming the design. Overall, the palette supports accessible reading and interaction while preserving the minimal and elegant aesthetic.

headings.headingsUsageGuide: Use the heading font in large sizes with tight letter spacing to create strong visual impact and hierarchy. Headings should be uppercase or all caps for a clean, modern look. Pair headings with the serif paragraph font to create contrast and balance. Maintain generous spacing around headings to preserve the minimal aesthetic. Use the 'primary' color for headings to ensure maximum readability and emphasis.
headings.headingsAccessibilityNotes: Headings in 'primary' color on 'background' provide excellent contrast and meet WCAG AA standards for all sizes, ensuring clear readability and accessibility.

paragraphs.paragraphsUsageGuide: Use the paragraph font in smaller sizes with italic styling to add a refined, editorial tone. This font contrasts with the bold sans-serif headings, creating a balanced typographic hierarchy. Use the 'secondary' color for body text and captions to soften the visual weight while maintaining readability. Maintain ample line height and spacing to enhance legibility and preserve the airy feel of the layout.
paragraphs.paragraphsAccessibilityNotes: Paragraph text in 'secondary' color on 'background' meets WCAG AA contrast requirements for body text, ensuring accessible reading while supporting the elegant design.

welcomeSectionTypography.implementation: The welcome section uses a two-column layout with large, bold headings occupying the left quadrant and a product image with rounded corners on the right quadrant. This placement balances visual weight between text and imagery, creating a harmonious and inviting introduction. The heading's large size and tight letter spacing draw immediate attention, while the image's soft edges and neutral background complement the typography. The generous white space around both elements enhances clarity and focus, reinforcing the minimal and elegant brand identity.

components.containers: Containers use generous padding and subtle borders in 'subtleBorder' color to define sections without heavy visual weight. Rounded corners soften container edges, maintaining the minimal and approachable feel. Backgrounds remain in 'background' color to preserve consistency.
components.images: Product images are presented with muted, neutral backgrounds in 'mutedGray' or similar tones, with rounded corners to soften the geometric layout. Images are large and clear, emphasizing product form and material without distraction.
components.buttons: Buttons are minimal with thin borders in 'primary' color and transparent backgrounds. Text inside buttons uses 'primary' color for clarity. On hover, buttons may invert colors or slightly darken the border to indicate interactivity while maintaining subtlety.

graphicElements.icons: Icons are line-based, minimal, and use the 'primary' color to maintain consistency with text and UI elements. They are simple and unobtrusive, supporting navigation and interaction without drawing excessive attention.
graphicElements.illustrations: No illustrations are used, keeping the focus on product photography and typography to maintain a clean and sophisticated look.
graphicElements.stickers: Stickers or badges, such as sale indicators, use subtle outlines in 'primary' color with italic serif text to blend with the editorial tone without disrupting the minimal aesthetic.

brandIdentity.designSummary: This brand design embodies a modern, minimalistic aesthetic with a focus on clarity, professionalism, and natural sophistication. The color palette is restrained, featuring a deep dark green as the primary color for impactful backgrounds and text blocks, complemented by a soft, muted greenish-beige background that evokes calmness and sustainability. White and black are used strategically for text and navigation elements to ensure high contrast and readability. Typography is clean and geometric, with a sans-serif font family that balances bold headings and readable body text, creating a clear hierarchy and an approachable yet authoritative tone. The layout is grid-based and modular, emphasizing spaciousness and balance with generous negative space and well-defined content areas. Iconography is minimal and line-based, reinforcing the architectural and professional theme. Overall, the design communicates trust, expertise, and a commitment to quality, making it versatile for various professional service industries.
brandIdentity.toneOfVoice: Professional, trustworthy, refined, and approachable with a focus on expertise and sustainability.

palette.paletteUsageGuide: Use the 'primary' color as the main background for key text sections to create strong visual impact and ensure readability with text in 'primaryForeground'. The 'secondary' color serves as a calm, natural background for supporting content areas, paired with text in 'secondaryForeground' for clear contrast. The 'background' color is used for general page backgrounds and navigation areas to maintain a clean and open feel. This palette supports accessibility by providing high contrast combinations between 'primary' and 'primaryForeground' as well as 'secondary' and 'secondaryForeground'. Avoid mixing 'primary' and 'secondary' backgrounds directly to maintain visual clarity. The restrained palette allows for a professional and trustworthy brand presence while evoking natural and sustainable values.
palette.paletteAccessibilityNotes: The 'primary' color (#152F23) against 'primaryForeground' (#FFFFFF) achieves excellent contrast exceeding WCAG AA standards for text and UI elements. The 'secondary' color (#E7EBD8) with 'secondaryForeground' (#000000) also meets WCAG AA contrast requirements for body text and smaller UI elements. The 'background' color (#FFFFFF) with black text ensures maximum readability. This palette is optimized for accessibility across all text and interface components.

headings.headingsUsageGuide: Use the heading font for all major titles and section headers to establish a clear visual hierarchy. Pair with the paragraph font for body text to maintain readability and balance. Headings should have ample spacing above and below to separate content blocks and improve scanability. Use 'primaryForeground' color on 'primary' backgrounds or black on lighter backgrounds for optimal contrast.
headings.headingsAccessibilityNotes: Headings using the 'primary' color background with 'primaryForeground' text meet WCAG AA contrast standards. On lighter backgrounds, black text ensures excellent readability and accessibility.

paragraphs.paragraphsUsageGuide: Use the paragraph font for all body text, descriptions, and smaller informational content. Maintain sufficient line height and letter spacing to enhance readability. Combine with heading fonts to create a balanced typographic system. Text color should be 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' backgrounds or black on white backgrounds to ensure clarity.
paragraphs.paragraphsAccessibilityNotes: Body text colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratios against their respective backgrounds, ensuring accessibility for all users.

welcomeSectionTypography.implementation: The welcome section uses a split layout with a large image occupying the left half and text content on the right half. This placement creates a visual balance that draws attention to both imagery and messaging. The text is aligned left with generous padding, ensuring readability and a clean presentation. The quadrant weighting emphasizes the image while allowing the text to anchor the message clearly, supporting user engagement and brand storytelling.

components.containers: Containers use solid backgrounds in 'primary' or 'secondary' colors to separate content areas clearly. They have consistent padding and margins to maintain spatial balance and readability. Borders are minimal or absent, relying on color contrast and spacing for separation.
components.images: Images are large, high-quality architectural photographs with natural lighting and neutral tones. They are placed prominently, often occupying half or full sections, balanced with text content. Images have no borders or shadows, maintaining a clean and modern look.
components.buttons: Buttons are minimal with clear outlines or solid fills in 'primary' color, with text in 'primaryForeground'. They have subtle hover states to indicate interactivity. Secondary buttons use 'secondary' color outlines with 'secondaryForeground' text. Button shapes are rectangular with slight rounding for a modern feel.

graphicElements.icons: Icons are line-based, minimal, and architectural in style, using black or 'primaryForeground' colors depending on background. They are simple and clear, supporting content without distraction.
graphicElements.illustrations: No illustrations are used, maintaining a clean and professional aesthetic.
graphicElements.stickers: No stickers or badges are present, reinforcing the minimal and serious tone.

brandIdentity.designSummary: This brand design features a modern, minimalistic aesthetic with a restrained neutral color palette dominated by light gray and dark charcoal backgrounds, complemented by a pale yellow highlight color. The layout is grid-based and modular, emphasizing clarity and organization with generous spacing and subtle dividing lines. Typography is clean, sans-serif, and highly legible, with a clear hierarchy between bold headings and regular body text. Iconography is minimal and line-based, reinforcing the professional and approachable tone. The overall visual personality is functional, trustworthy, and user-friendly, suitable for service-oriented websites requiring clear communication and easy navigation.
brandIdentity.toneOfVoice: Professional, clear, approachable, and trustworthy with a modern and minimalistic personality.

palette.paletteUsageGuide: Use the 'primary' color as the main background for dark-themed sections and for text/icons on light backgrounds. The 'primaryForeground' color is used for text and icons on the 'primary' background to ensure high contrast and readability. The 'background' color serves as the base background for most content areas, with 'secondaryForeground' used for primary text and icons on this background. The 'highlight' color is reserved for emphasizing selected or important UI elements such as active cards, headings, and icons, providing a warm and inviting accent that contrasts well with 'primary'. This palette ensures a balanced visual hierarchy and accessibility across different sections of the website.
palette.paletteAccessibilityNotes: The 'primaryForeground' on 'primary' background and 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' background combinations meet WCAG AA standards for text contrast, ensuring readability. The 'highlight' color on 'primary' backgrounds provides sufficient contrast for headings and icons, supporting accessibility for users with visual impairments.

headings.headingsUsageGuide: Use the heading font for all major titles and section headers to establish clear content hierarchy. Pair with the paragraph font for body text to maintain readability and visual balance. Maintain generous spacing above and below headings to enhance clarity. Headings should be in 'primaryForeground' color on dark backgrounds and 'secondaryForeground' on light backgrounds for optimal contrast.
headings.headingsAccessibilityNotes: Headings using the 'primaryForeground' color on 'primary' background and 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' background meet WCAG AA contrast requirements, ensuring accessibility.

paragraphs.paragraphsUsageGuide: Use the paragraph font for all body text and descriptive content. Maintain consistent line height and letter spacing for readability. Text should appear in 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' backgrounds and 'primaryForeground' on 'primary' backgrounds. Avoid using both the 'highlight' and 'secondary' color for body text to preserve legibility.
paragraphs.paragraphsAccessibilityNotes: Paragraph text colors on their respective backgrounds meet WCAG AA contrast standards, supporting accessibility.

welcomeSectionTypography.implementation: The welcome section typography is anchored in the top third of the layout, creating a natural focal point for users. Large, bold headings are placed with ample margin above and below, paired with smaller body text for context. This placement balances visual weight and guides the user’s eye downward through the content. The use of the 'highlight' color for key headings adds emphasis without overwhelming the neutral background, maintaining a clean and inviting introduction.

spacing.rows: Implicit rows with consistent vertical spacing
spacing.gaps: Consistent medium gaps between grid items

grid.margins: Generous page margins to frame content
grid.padding: Consistent padding within cards and containers

components.containers: Containers use subtle borders and background fills to separate content areas. The highlighted container uses the 'highlight' color as background to draw attention. Padding is consistent to maintain visual balance and readability.
components.images: Images are used sparingly and placed alongside text in balanced two-column layouts. They have natural proportions and no heavy framing, blending seamlessly with the background.
components.buttons: Buttons are minimal with subtle borders and use the 'highlight' color for text or background on hover states. They maintain the clean and functional aesthetic without heavy decoration.

graphicElements.icons: Icons are simple line drawings with consistent stroke weight, using 'secondaryForeground' color on light backgrounds and 'highlight' color for emphasis. They are functional and minimal, supporting content without distraction.
graphicElements.illustrations: No illustrations are present, maintaining the minimal and professional tone.
graphicElements.stickers: No stickers or badges are used, preserving the clean and uncluttered design.

brandIdentity.designSummary: This design features a contemporary editorial style with a strong emphasis on large, geometric sans-serif typography and bold color blocking. The layout is modular and grid-based, balancing text and images with generous negative space and asymmetrical compositions. The color palette is warm and earthy, dominated by a bright red for emphasis, deep chocolate brown for grounding, muted beige as a neutral background, and mustard yellow for highlight areas. Typography hierarchy is clear with massive uppercase headings and light, readable body text. The overall aesthetic is minimal yet impactful, combining modernity with an artistic edge, suitable for creative and cultural brands.
brandIdentity.toneOfVoice: Confident, modern, artistic, and bold with a sophisticated yet approachable personality.

palette.paletteUsageGuide: Use the 'primary' color for key headings, call-to-action blocks, and emphasis elements to draw immediate attention. The 'primaryForeground' color should be used for text and icons placed on the 'primary' background to ensure clear readability. The 'secondary' color serves as a grounding tone for backgrounds, text blocks, and navigation elements, paired with 'secondaryForeground' for text to maintain contrast and warmth. The 'background' color provides a neutral, soft canvas that balances the stronger colors and supports content legibility. The 'highlightYellow' custom color is best used for large background sections or accent areas to create visual interest and break up the layout. Colors should be combined thoughtfully to maintain strong contrast and accessibility, with 'primary' and 'secondary' colors never used together without sufficient spacing or neutral buffer.
palette.paletteAccessibilityNotes: The 'primaryForeground' on 'primary' background meets WCAG AA standards for large text and AAA for normal text. The 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' background also meets WCAG AA contrast ratios for body text. The 'background' color paired with 'secondary' and 'primary' colors provides sufficient contrast for readability. The 'highlightYellow' should be used with 'secondary' or 'primaryForeground' text to maintain accessibility compliance.

headings.headingsUsageGuide: Use the heading font in large uppercase sizes to create strong visual hierarchy and impact. Pair with lighter paragraph fonts to maintain readability and balance. Maintain tight letter spacing for headings to preserve the bold, compact look. Ensure headings contrast strongly with background colors, preferably using 'primary' or 'secondary' colors with their respective foregrounds.
headings.headingsAccessibilityNotes: Headings using this font with 'primaryForeground' on 'primary' or 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' backgrounds meet WCAG AA contrast standards for all sizes.

paragraphs.paragraphsUsageGuide: Use the paragraph font in sentence case with moderate line height and letter spacing for comfortable reading. Pair with bold headings to create clear typographic contrast. Text color should primarily be 'secondary' or 'secondaryForeground' on 'background' to ensure legibility. Avoid using paragraph fonts in all caps to maintain readability.
paragraphs.paragraphsAccessibilityNotes: Paragraph text using 'secondary' on 'background' or 'secondaryForeground' on 'secondary' meets WCAG AA contrast ratios for body text.

welcomeSectionTypography.implementation: The welcome section uses a large, bold heading placed asymmetrically across the layout's quadrants, balancing text blocks with images and color blocks. This placement creates dynamic visual tension and guides the viewer's eye through the content. The typography is oversized and tightly spaced, emphasizing the brand's confident and modern tone.

components.containers: Containers are defined by solid color blocks or thin borders, creating clear separation between content areas. Background colors from the palette are used to differentiate sections, with ample padding to maintain clarity and focus.
components.images: Images are presented in clean rectangular frames, sometimes rotated or offset to add dynamism. They are integrated within color blocks or alongside text, maintaining balance and visual interest without overpowering the typography.
components.buttons: Buttons are minimal and rectangular with solid fills or outlines in the 'primary' color. Text on buttons uses 'primaryForeground' for contrast. Buttons maintain a clean, modern look consistent with the overall design.

graphicElements.icons: Icons are minimal, geometric, and monochromatic, typically using the 'secondaryForeground' or 'primaryForeground' colors to maintain visual harmony with the typography and color blocks.
graphicElements.illustrations: No illustrations are used; the design relies on photography and typography for visual storytelling.
graphicElements.stickers: No stickers or badges are present; emphasis is on clean, bold typography and color blocking.

brandBook.toneOfVoice: Sophisticated, minimalistic, elegant, and modern with a calm and refined personality.

components.buttons: Buttons are minimal with thin borders in 'primary' color and transparent backgrounds. Text inside buttons uses 'primary' color for clarity. On hover, buttons may invert colors or slightly darken the border to indicate interactivity while maintaining subtlety.
components.containers: Containers use generous padding and subtle borders in 'subtleBorder' color to define sections without heavy visual weight. Rounded corners soften container edges, maintaining the minimal and approachable feel. Backgrounds remain in 'background' color to preserve consistency.

headings.headingsUsageGuide: Use the heading font in large sizes with tight letter spacing to create strong visual impact and hierarchy. Headings should be uppercase or all caps for a clean, modern look. Pair headings with the serif paragraph font to create contrast and balance. Maintain generous spacing around headings to preserve the minimal aesthetic. Use the 'primary' color for headings to ensure maximum readability and emphasis.
headings.headingsAccessibilityNotes: Headings in 'primary' color on 'background' provide excellent contrast and meet WCAG AA standards for all sizes, ensuring clear readability and accessibility.

paragraphs.paragraphsUsageGuide: Use the paragraph font in smaller sizes with italic styling to add a refined, editorial tone. This font contrasts with the bold sans-serif headings, creating a balanced typographic hierarchy. Use the 'secondary' color for body text and captions to soften the visual weight while maintaining readability. Maintain ample line height and spacing to enhance legibility and preserve the airy feel of the layout.
paragraphs.paragraphsAccessibilityNotes: Paragraph text in 'secondary' color on 'background' meets WCAG AA contrast requirements for body text, ensuring accessible reading while supporting the elegant design.

welcomeSectionTypography.implementation: The welcome section uses a two-column layout with large, bold headings occupying the left quadrant and a product image with rounded corners on the right quadrant. This placement balances visual weight between text and imagery, creating a harmonious and inviting introduction. The heading's large size and tight letter spacing draw immediate attention, while the image's soft edges and neutral background complement the typography. The generous white space around both elements enhances clarity and focus, reinforcing the minimal and elegant brand identity.

graphicElements.icons: Icons are line-based, minimal, and use the 'primary' color to maintain consistency with text and UI elements. They are simple and unobtrusive, supporting navigation and interaction without drawing excessive attention.
graphicElements.stickers: Stickers or badges, such as sale indicators, use subtle outlines in 'primary' color with italic serif text to blend with the editorial tone without disrupting the minimal aesthetic.
graphicElements.illustrations: No illustrations are used, keeping the focus on product photography and typography to maintain a clean and sophisticated look.

The color palette is dominated by a soft, warm off-white background paired with black and dark gray text for high contrast and readability. Typography plays a central role, combining large, bold, geometric sans-serif headings with delicate italic serif body text to create a sophisticated editorial tone. The layout uses generous white space and a modular grid with consistent margins and subtle rounded corners on images and cards, adding a modern yet approachable softness. UI elements are understated with thin borders and minimal fills, emphasizing clarity and elegance. Overall, the design conveys a timeless, high-end brand identity suitable for luxury products, focusing on simplicity, clarity, and subtle sophistication.

palette.paletteUsageGuide: Use the 'background' color as the primary canvas to create a soft, warm environment that supports content without distraction. The 'primary' color is reserved for main text and headings to ensure maximum readability and strong visual hierarchy. The 'secondary' color is used for less prominent text and UI elements, providing subtle contrast without overpowering the primary text. The 'subtleBorder' color is ideal for delicate dividing lines and borders around interactive elements, maintaining the minimal aesthetic. The 'mutedGray' color can be used for secondary UI elements or placeholder text to add depth without breaking the calm tone. All colors should be combined to maintain high contrast and accessibility, with 'primary' text on 'background' for main content and 'secondary' for supporting text. Avoid using heavy fills or saturated colors to preserve the understated luxury feel.
palette.paletteAccessibilityNotes: The 'primary' color on 'background' provides excellent contrast exceeding WCAG AA standards for all text sizes. The 'secondary' color on 'background' also meets WCAG AA contrast requirements for body text and UI elements. Borders and subtle UI accents using 'subtleBorder' and 'mutedGray' maintain sufficient contrast for visibility without overwhelming the design. Overall, the palette supports accessible reading and interaction while preserving the minimal and elegant aesthetic.

initialPrompt: Create a reusable Wix Stores site template with a clean, neutral, modern design and a simple structure. The store concept is sporting goods (clothing, water bottles, accessories). Use mock data only. Pages: Home (hero, value props, featured products, promo section), Shop (product grid, filters), Product Page, About, Contact. Focus on clarity, scalability, and ease of customization. Avoid advanced custom code or complex interactions.
